positive: A central composition illustration featuring a stylish, stylized astronaut floating in deep space, surrounded by geometric nebula patterns and minimalist constellations. The astronaut wears a sleek, retro-futuristic suit with glowing accent lines, contrasting against the deep midnight blue and vibrant cyan-purple gradient background. Strong use of negative space and clean silhouettes. Art deco influence mixed with vaporwave aesthetics. High contrast, vivid colors, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing or apparel transfer. Minimalist, clean lines, symmetrical composition, 8K illustration, hyper-detailed digital art.
